center.name: 亞諾斯
center.summary: 亞諾斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Crestless curassow、美洲紅䴉、啸鹭等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also inhabits successional vegetation on riverbanks and islands and the Llanos of Colombia and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: beniensis, northeastern and central Bolivia from Beni to Santa Cruz The cobalt-winged parakeet inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges and interior of rainforest, secondary forest, várzea , savanna, and Llanos

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It mostly inhabits rainforest along rivers, though it is also found in gallery forest in the llanos of Colombia and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits semi-open to open landscapes including Llanos, deciduous woodland, secondary and gallery forest, plantations, and treed parts of towns

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits the edges of gallery and secondary forest in llanos grasslands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the pale-tipped inezia is found in the Llanos of northeastern Colombia through central and eastern Venezuela and the Guianas into the upper Branco River basin and extreme northern Amapá state of northern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In eastern Colombia and western Venezuela it occurs in scrubby and thorny areas along watercourses in the Llanos

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In northern Central America it also inhabits semideciduous forest, and gallery forest in the llanos of Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brunnescens has a limited range in the Llanos of extreme northeastern Colombia into Venezuela from Táchira and Portuguesa east to northwestern Bolívar. The short-crested flycatcher inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are somewhat open

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in rainforest, both deciduous and gallery forest, várzea, mangroves, llanos, palm savanna, and palm, shade coffee, and other treed plantations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of two-banded puffbird is found in the llanos of northeastern Colombia and into northern Venezuela almost to Lake Maracaibo on the west, east to near the Guyana border, and south slightly into Amazonas and Bolívar states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|in Ecuador The white-winged swallow (Tachycineta albiventer) is a resident breeding swallow in tropical South America found in Brazil, Colombia, Venezuela, Trinidad, and Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The subspecies fostersmithi inhabits the Llanos and the Orinoco basin of Colombia and Venezuela. The subspecies sibilatrix inhabits eastern Bolivia, Paraguay, western and southern Brazil, Uruguay, Chile, and northeastern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native flocks exist in Brazil; Colombia; French Guiana; Guyana; Suriname; and Venezuela, as well as the islands of the Netherlands Antilles, and Trinidad and Tobago. Flocks gather in wetlands and other marshy habitats, including mud flats, shoreline and rainforest. Outlying colonies have been identified in the coastal areas of the states of Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo (for example in the Santos-Cubatão mangroves of the Baixada Santista district), Paraná and Santa Catarina. In recent years, bird colonies can be seen as far south as in the coastal areas of Joinville and the island of São Francisco do Sul. The highest concentrations are found in the Llanos region of western Venezuela and eastern Colombia
